raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadehſ rangi / tahs Dee-
nas nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Ka fchi Weeta ne taps warrs
nofaukta Towete/ jeb ta Eeleija
Ben-Innoma/ bet Slepkawi-
bas-Eeleija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es isnihzinaschu to Pa-
dohimu Juhda un Jerusalemes
schinni Weetâ / un likchu tohs
zaur Sohbinu krist preekſch win-
nu Eenatdneekem / un zaur to
Rohku to/ kas winnu Dwehſeli
mekle/ un es nodohſchu winnu
nomirruſchas Meeſas par Bar-
ribu teem Putneem appakſch
Debbes / un teem Swebreem
wirs Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es likſchn scho Pilſſab-
tn par pohſtu Weetu/ un par
Apſimeekli/ wiss/ kas fezzen eet/
tas brihnitees / un fwilpehs pahr
wiſahin winno Mohkahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es dohſchu teem tahs
Meeſas winno Dehtu / un tahs
Meeſas winno Meitu ehſt/ un
tee ehdihſ ikweens tahs Meeſas
fawa Tuwaka eckſch tahm Beh-
dahm/ un eckſch tahs Batlibas/
ar ko winnu Eenatdneeki/ un tas
winnu Dwehſeſs mekle/ tohe
apvehdtinabs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhſ tew to Kruhſi
fadausihſt preekſch to Wihru Az-
zim/ kas ar terwin ter gabjutchi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un uhs teem fazzihſt : Ta-
fakka tas KUNGS Zebaot : Ta-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta darrifchu es fchat
Weetai/ fakka tas KUNGS:
un winnas Eedsihrotajeem/ un
darrifchu fcho Pilſtahtu ka To-
weti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Namini no Jeru-
salemes/ un tee Nammi to Keh-
nixu no Juhda buhs fagahniti/
itt ka tee fkaisti Nammi eekſch
Towetes/ ar wiſſeem teem Nam-
meim/ us kuru Jumteem tee
wiſſam Debbes Spehkam irr
kwehpinaiffchi / un fwescheem
Deeweem Dseramo-Uppureis
uppureifschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Jeremijus no
Towetes nahze/ kurp tas KUNGS
winnu bij fuhtijs fluddinaht /
tad fiahweja winſch eekſch ta
Pagalmja ta KUNGA Nam-
ma/ un fazztja uhs wiſſeem Lau-
dim:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebaot / tas Israëla Deews:
Raugi / es weddiſchn pahr fcho
Pilſſabtu/ un pahr wiſſeem win-
na Pilſſahteem to Laanumu /
to es pahr to efmu runnajs/ ta-
pehz ka tee tarwu Pakanfu irr ap-
feettinaiffchi/ un manns Wahro-
ous ne klauffſcht.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
